note: Pre-seeded statutory notices. In production these come from the recorder's legally-mandated notice-publication stream.

items.title: Notice of tax sale — 3690 E Palmer St
items.body: Maricopa County Treasurer has issued a notice of tax sale for parcel 304-78-406 in Seville Parcel 3. Redemption deadline: May 15, 2026.

items.title: Probate notice — Hogue estate
items.body: Publication of probate notice for estate affecting parcel 304-77-689. Creditors must file within 4 months.

items.title: Lis pendens — 2720 E Palmer St
items.body: Civil action affecting title filed in Maricopa Superior Court. Case number CV2026-001420.
